    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ConversionResult
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convert(Path bundlePath, ConversionOptions options)
    Converts an Apigee bundle to OpenAPI specification with custom options.
    ConversionResult

    Converts an Apigee bundle and saves the result to a file.
    io.swagger.v3.oas.models.OpenAPI
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.generateOpenApi(ApigeeBundle bundle, ConversionOptions options)
    Generates OpenAPI spec from an already-parsed bundle.
